training_status: increased workout consistency and intensity after ~1 month on Reta

benefits.description: Lost a quarter inch off belly in 3 weeks despite no scale weight loss, after ramping up workout intensity
Improved insulin sensitivity noted as a benefit aiding muscle building

protocol_notes: About a month after starting Reta, increased workout consistency and intensity. No weight loss for 3 weeks during that period but lost quarter inch off belly. Notes Reta improves insulin sensitivity.
